title: BBAI - BigBear.ai Holdings Inc Stock Price Forecast 2026, 2027 - FinViz
text: BBAI stock price forecast and analysis on FinViz. The screener tool provides fundamental and technical data for BigBear.ai. Current metrics show P/E issues due to negative earnings, but strong revenue growth trajectory is evident. Valuation multiples relative to peers in the AI and defense sectors provide context for investment decisions.
